issues.description: First effect missing DON!! cost structure. [On Play] DON!! −1 must be represented as a cost condition, not just trigger. Current DSL does not capture the optional DON!! return mechanic.
TrashFromHand action is present but effect text says 'You may trash 2 cards' — this is optional, not mandatory. Action should reflect optionality and require exactly 2 cards, not unspecified count.

PlayFromHand filter incorrect. Effect requires cards from trash (not hand), specifically 'GERMA 66' type Characters with 4000 power or less, up to 4 cards with different names. Current filter targets hand and lacks differentiation constraint.
Second effect targets opponent's DON!! cards (not Characters). Current target 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is wrong. Should target DON!! tokens on opponent's field.
Second effect missing DON!! −1 cost. [Activate: Main] with 'DON!! −1' cost is not represented in DSL.
